title: Norris strikes back at Verstappen rumours as F1 faces Silverstone 'nightmare'
summary:
Lando Norris struck back at the reports linking Max Verstappen to McLaren on media day ahead of this weekend’s British Grand Prix, with the Dutchman's camp supposedly behind the talks. 

Elsewhere on media day, LEGO announced each driver would have their own car for the drivers' parade, Lewis Hamilton revealed he might choose to miss it, and several drivers outlined how Silverstone will be an energy-management 'nightmare'.

Join RacingNews365’s Nick Golding and Samuel Coop as they dissect British GP media day!

title: Leclerc slams Ferrari brake failure after Monaco GP crash
summary: On The Chequered Flag Podcast, BBC F1 correspondent Andrew Benson reads out Charles Leclerc's comments stating his Ferrari brake issue is "borderline dangerous" after crashing out of the Monaco Grand Prix. Running in a podium position late in the race, Leclerc lost control into the barriers after three out of four brakes failed to work.
